\tzpentry{ID4383}{Coup Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4383 introduces Coup Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \Hhat_{p}^{\mathrm{coup}} = \int_0^L \mathrm{d}s\; \bigl[ J_p(s)\, \hat{\psi}_{p,+}^\dagger(s) \hat{\psi}_{p,-}(s) + J_p^*(s)\, \hat{\psi}_{p,-}^\dagger(s) \hat{\psi}_{p,+}(s) \bigr], \end{equation}
